positive: A maximalist, repeating pattern illustration featuring whimsical forest animals (foxes, raccoons, owls) intertwined with stylized celestial elements (moons, constellations, crescent moons) and deep forest flora (ferns, mushrooms). The composition should be a dense, symmetrically arranged repeating tile pattern, designed for seamless apparel printing. Use a sophisticated color palette of deep forest greens, sapphire blues, antique gold, and dusty mustard yellows. The style should be a blend of detailed vintage botanical engraving and modern psychedelic art, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast lines. The overall mood is magical and nostalgic. Central focus on the interplay between fauna and cosmos. Vector art style, high definition, intricate linework, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, words, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, artifacts, noise, messy, abstract, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, gradients, photorealistic, cinematic
